description:
VITAL TOOLS (2021)
Secteur d’activité / Sector : Business Software and services
vitaltools.io
Fondateur / Founder
E-mail
Adresse / Address
YASSINE BOUCHOUCHA
yassine.bouchoucha@vitaltools.tn
15 Street Abdelhamid Ibn Badis, ALAIN SAVARY, Tunis 
1002
Activité Nous avons construit les solutions informatiques 
les plus abordables pour la gestion d'entreprise. e-ERP est 
notre première plateforme collaborative en ligne axée sur 
la gestion des tâches/projets.
Aspect Technologique Une application web de gestion 
collaborative 
des 
tâches/projets 
pour 
les 
équipes 
commerciales et techniques. -un tableur intuitif pour 
faciliter la saisie des données allouées à une tâche/
événement avec le meilleur mode d'affichage pour une vue 
panoramique sur toute la durée du projet.
Originalité Dans un seul outil élémentaire (tableur), je 
permets à l'utilisateur de saisir intuitivement les données, 
puis de visualiser les tâches/événements en plusieurs 
modes. -simplicité d'utilisation et de manipulation de la 
plateforme -la possibilité de voir et d'interagir avec le projet 
dans différents modes Bird-Vue -facilité de collaboration 
entre les membres internes et externes de l'entreprise.
Activity We built the most affordable IT solutions for 
business management. e-ERP is our first collaborative 
online platform focused tasks/project management.
Technological 
Aspect 
A 
collaborative 
task/project 
management web application for commercial and 
technical team. -an intuitive spreadsheet to facilitate 
data entry allocated to a task/event with the best display 
mode for a panoramic view over the entire duration of 
the project.
Originality In a single elementary tool (spreadsheet) I 
allow the user to intuitively enter the data, then display 
the tasks/event in several Modes. -simplicity of use and 
manipulation of the platform -the possibility of seeing 
and interacting with the project in different Bird-Vue 
mode -easy collaboration between internal and external 
members of the company.
FR
EN

# Manage Your Workload Seamlessly from Day One with Electron-ERP
Experience the seamless blend of simplicity and power. Ready to use, easy to master, and with end-2-end **AI assistant** on the horizon to revolutionize your projects.
[Free Trial !](https://www.vitaltools.io/sign-up/)[Contact Us](https://www.vitaltools.io/contact/)

Task delegation to anyone: third parties, interns, guests... No user count limits.

User-friendly. No intricate Best Practices. Templates set at registration.

Spreadsheet based user interface and tables user experience with intuitive design.

About Us
## We Leverage Latest Technologies To Deliver Optimum Management Tool
At Vital Tools, we harness cutting-edge technologies to bring you the ultimate management solutions. With Electron-ERP, you benefit from.
* Monthly update
* End-to-End AI Capabilities (Beta)
* Future proof solutions
* Complimentary 24/7 support
Services
## Our Expertise, Tailored for You
Electron-ERP is our flagship offering, providing holistic management across all departments: technical, marketing, finance, and sales.
### [Tasks Management](https://www.vitaltools.io/services/project-management/)
Organize daily/weekly tasks, team up for collaboration, or utilize it for insights.
### [Cash Flow](https://www.vitaltools.io/services/cash-flow/)
Draft varied income/expenses scenarios and monitor day-to-day balances.
### [CRM Sales](https://www.vitaltools.io/services/crm-sales/)
Consolidate contacts and optimize sales for superior client journey conversions.
![Image](https://www.vitaltools.io/images/shape/services-shape/1.png)![Image](https://www.vitaltools.io/images/shape/services-shape/2.png)![Image](https://www.vitaltools.io/images/shape/services-shape/3.png)![Image](https://www.vitaltools.io/images/shape/services-shape/4.png)![Image](https://www.vitaltools.io/images/shape/services-shape/5.png)![Image](https://www.vitaltools.io/images/shape/services-shape/6.png)
## Elevate Your Business's Resilience & Edge
### Unified Management Streamlines Workflows
One platform trumps twenty for holistic enterprise management.
### Prioritize Core Business Impact
Time, a company's prime asset; complex tools eat it, costing you more.

How Achieving Small Business Success?
Put energy, time and ressources at the right places.
Management Is What Makes An Effective Business?
Effective management refers to achieving goals and targets for the organization by encouraging employees to grow their skills and put their 100% effort into the right tasks.
Why Centralized Management Tools is mandatory?
Centralization lets top managers develop a broad view of operations and exercise tight financial controls.
